name: risques-majeurs-mcp
description: Serveur MCP d'exposition aux risques majeurs en France

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=client/mcp-app.html vite build
scripts.start-dev: concurrently "tsx watch server/index.ts" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=client/mcp-app.html vite build --watch"
scripts.start: concurrently "tsx watch server/index.ts" "cross-env INPUT=client/mcp-app.html vite build --watch"
